/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++17 -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/utest.dir/utest.cpp.o -o utest   -L/opt/ros/humble/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib -lpfmshog ../libcontrollers.a -lpfmsconnector ../liblaserprocessing.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libignition-transport11.so.11.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a -lpfmsconnector /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libignition-msgs8.so.8.7.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libignition-math6.so.6.15.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so -luuid
